'''鈭歴h-p-j''' ('''shapaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yump|yump]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yump|yump]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-p-j
|-
! Lemma
| shapaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapajithi|shapajithi]] || [[word:shapajiji|shapajiji]] || [[word:shapajishi|shapajishi]] || [[word:shapaji|shapaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapajuthuth|shapajuthuth]] || [[word:shapajujuj|shapajujuj]] || [[word:shapajushush|shapajushush]] || [[word:shapaj|shapaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapajuthu|shapajuthu]] || [[word:shapajuju|shapajuju]] || [[word:shapajushu|shapajushu]] || [[word:shapaju|shapaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapajufuth|shapajufuth]] || [[word:shapajufuj|shapajufuj]] || [[word:shapajufush|shapajufush]] || [[word:shapajuf|shapajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapajethe|shapajethe]] || [[word:shapajeje|shapajeje]] || [[word:shapajeshe|shapajeshe]] || [[word:shapaje|shapaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapajothoth|shapajothoth]] || [[word:shapajojoj|shapajojoj]] || [[word:shapajoshosh|shapajoshosh]] || [[word:shapaj|shapaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapajotho|shapajotho]] || [[word:shapajojo|shapajojo]] || [[word:shapajosho|shapajosho]] || [[word:shapajo|shapajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapajofoth|shapajofoth]] || [[word:shapajofoj|shapajofoj]] || [[word:shapajofosh|shapajofosh]] || [[word:shapajof|shapajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapaj忙th忙|shapaj忙th忙]] || [[word:shapaj忙j忙|shapaj忙j忙]] || [[word:shapaj忙sh忙|shapaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:shapaj忙|shapaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapajathath|shapajathath]] || [[word:shapajajaj|shapajajaj]] || [[word:shapajashash|shapajashash]] || [[word:shapaj|shapaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapajatha|shapajatha]] || [[word:shapajaja|shapajaja]] || [[word:shapajasha|shapajasha]] || [[word:shapaja|shapaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapajafath|shapajafath]] || [[word:shapajafaj|shapajafaj]] || [[word:shapajafash|shapajafash]] || [[word:shapajaf|shapajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shapajasha|shapajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapajasha|goshapajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapajasha|gokishapajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shapajn眉sha|shapajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapajnkn眉sha|goshapajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajn眉sha|gokishapajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapajsh毛sha|shapajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapajnksh毛sha|goshapajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapajsh毛sha|gokishapajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajrosha|shapajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajnkrosha|goshapajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajrosha|gokishapajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajmusha|shapajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajnkmusha|goshapajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajmusha|gokishapajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapajsherasha|shapajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapajnksherasha|goshapajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapajsherasha|gokishapajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapajngasha|shapajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapajnkngasha|goshapajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapajngasha|gokishapajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapajyasha|shapajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapajnkyasha|goshapajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapajyasha|gokishapajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapajyamasha|shapajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapajnkyamasha|goshapajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapajyamasha|gokishapajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajn眉sh毛sha|shapajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajnkn眉sh毛sha|goshapajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajn眉sh毛sha|gokishapajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajn眉rosha|shapajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajnkn眉rosha|goshapajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajn眉rosha|gokishapajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajn眉musha|shapajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajnkn眉musha|goshapajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajn眉musha|gokishapajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajsh毛n眉sha|shapajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajnksh毛n眉sha|goshapajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajsh毛n眉sha|gokishapajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajsh毛rosha|shapajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajnksh毛rosha|goshapajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajsh毛rosha|gokishapajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajsh毛musha|shapajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajnksh毛musha|goshapajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajsh毛musha|gokishapajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajron眉sha|shapajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajnkron眉sha|goshapajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajron眉sha|gokishapajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajrosh毛sha|shapajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajnkrosh毛sha|goshapajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajrosh毛sha|gokishapajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapajromusha|shapajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapajnkromusha|goshapajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapajromusha|gokishapajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapajmun眉sha|shapajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapajnkmun眉sha|goshapajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapajmun眉sha|gokishapajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapajmush毛sha|shapajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapajnkmush毛sha|goshapajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapajmush毛sha|gokishapajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapajmurosha|shapajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapajnkmurosha|goshapajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapajmurosha|gokishapajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shapaj|shapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙p忙j|sh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshapaj|hoshapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙p忙j|hosh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshapaj|hohoshapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙p忙j|hohosh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shapaj|n眉shapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙p忙j|n眉sh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shapaj|n眉n眉shapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙p忙j|n眉n眉sh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shapaj|n茂shapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙p忙j|n茂sh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shapaj|n茂n茂shapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙p忙j|n茂n茂sh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushapaj|lushapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙p忙j|lush忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushapaj|lulushapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙p忙j|lulush忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishapaj|lishapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙p忙j|lish忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishapaj|lilishapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙p忙j|lilish忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshapaj|koshapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙p忙j|kosh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshapaj|kokoshapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙p忙j|kokosh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshapaj|keshapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙p忙j|kesh忙p忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshapaj|kekeshapaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙p忙j|kekesh忙p忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
